product_overview: Vido is a self-hosted media management web app prioritizing Traditional Chinese metadata and robust filename parsing (including fansub conventions), with qBittorrent integration, multi-source metadata fallback, and a responsive single-page UI.
core_goals: Provide high-quality Traditional Chinese metadata for movies and TV shows with TMDb priority and multi-source fallback
Accurately parse complex filenames (fansub and standard) using AI-assisted parsing and learn user corrections over time
Integrate and monitor qBittorrent downloads in real-time (5s polling) and surface connection health
Offer a usable web UI: search, media library (grid/list), media detail editing, and settings with minimal setup (Docker)
Gracefully handle external API failures with fallback strategies, manual search/edit options, and persistent caching/backup

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Home dashboard showing active downloads, recently added media, qBittorrent connection health, notifications, and quick access to recent activity.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See active downloads with progress bars and counts -> See recently added media panel -> Click QB status indicator -> See connection history modal with events -> Dismiss modal -> See new media toast notification -> Click toast to open media detail panel

Navigate to / -> qBittorrent health API returns error -> See QB status indicator in disconnected state -> See toast 'Connection error' -> Click retry in UI -> Polling retries and still fails -> See persistent error message and recommendation to check /settings/qbittorrent

features.name: Media Library
features.description: Browse and manage the stored media collection with grid/list views, type filters, sorting, pagination, and item-level actions (delete, re-parse, export).
user_flows: Navigate to /library -> View default grid view of media items -> Click View Toggle to switch to list view -> Click a column header to Sort by year -> Open Pagination control -> Click Next page -> See item count update -> Open poster card context menu -> Click Delete -> Confirm delete dialog -> See item removed from list
Navigate to /library -> Filter media by type to 'TV' -> No items match filter -> See empty state message 'No media found' -> Click Clear filter -> See items repopulate
Navigate to /library -> Open poster card context menu -> Click Re-parse metadata -> Reparse API returns 500 error -> See inline error toast 'Re-parse failed' and option to retry

features.name: Search
features.description: Search TMDb for movies and TV shows (Traditional Chinese prioritized) with type filters and paginated results; results link to the media detail side panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Click search input -> Type '魔女宅急便' (>=2 characters) -> See paginated search results populate -> Click a result -> Navigate to /media/:type/:id and open media detail panel -> See Traditional Chinese title, poster, year, genres
Navigate to /search -> Click search input -> Type 'a' (less than 2 characters) -> See validation message 'Please enter at least 2 characters' -> Do not send API request

Navigate to /search -> Type query and submit -> TMDb API returns network error -> See error banner 'Search unavailable, please try again later' and suggestion to retry or use manual search in media detail

features.name: Downloads Monitor
features.description: Monitor qBittorrent downloads with status filtering, sorting, and near-real-time progress updates (polling every 5 seconds).
user_flows: Navigate to /downloads -> See list of torrents with progress bars -> Click filter tab 'Downloading' -> See only downloading items -> Observe progress bars update every 5 seconds -> Click a torrent row to view details (inline) -> See ETA and speed metrics

Navigate to /downloads -> Click filter tab 'Completed' -> No completed downloads -> See empty filter state message and call-to-action 'Scan completed downloads' -> Click scan -> See 'No new completed downloads' toast
Navigate to /downloads -> Downloads API returns error on poll -> See 'Unable to refresh downloads' inline error -> Polling backoff triggers exponential retry and shows last successful timestamp

features.name: Media Detail
features.description: Side panel presenting full metadata for a movie or TV show (title, poster, genres, rating, overview) with credits and a metadata editor for manual corrections and poster uploads.
user_flows: Navigate to /media/:type/:id -> See media detail side panel with title, poster, genres, rating and credits -> Click Edit button -> Metadata editor dialog opens -> Edit title and overview fields -> Upload poster via URL -> Click Save -> PUT /api/v1/media/:id/metadata returns success -> See updated metadata in side panel -> Click Close -> Return to previous route

Navigate to /media/:type/:id -> Click Edit button -> Change year to invalid value -> Click Save -> See inline validation error from Zod 'Invalid year' -> Correct value -> Click Save -> Network returns 502 -> See error toast 'Save failed, try again' and modal remains open
Navigate to /media/:type/:id -> Click Edit button -> Drag-and-drop poster file -> POST /api/v1/media/:id/poster returns 413 (file too large) -> See file size error and guidance for acceptable sizes

features.name: qBittorrent Settings
features.description: Configure qBittorrent connection (host, username, password), test the connection, and save the configuration securely.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/qbittorrent -> Fill Host field with host URL -> Fill Username field -> Fill Password field -> Click Test Connection -> POST /api/v1/settings/qbittorrent/test returns success with version -> See success message with qBittorrent version -> Click Save -> PUT /api/v1/settings/qbittorrent returns success -> See confirmation 'Settings saved'

Navigate to /settings/qbittorrent -> Fill Host with invalid URL -> Click Test Connection -> POST /api/v1/settings/qbittorrent/test returns connection error -> See inline error 'Connection failed' and suggestion to verify host and credentials -> Do not allow Save until test succeeds

features.name: Connection Health Monitoring
features.description: Real-time qBittorrent connection health indicator on the dashboard with a clickable history modal showing timestamped events and event-type filtering.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See QB health indicator showing 'connected' with green state -> Click QB health indicator -> Open connection history modal -> See list of timestamped connection events -> Click filter 'errors' -> See only error events displayed

Navigate to / -> QB health API returns degraded status -> See indicator show 'degraded' state -> Click indicator -> Connection history API returns error -> See inline modal error 'Unable to load history' and a retry button

features.name: Manual Metadata Search
features.description: From the metadata editor, manually search alternate metadata sources and apply selected metadata when automatic parsing fails or is incorrect.
user_flows: Navigate to /media/:type/:id -> Click Edit -> Click 'Manual Search' in metadata editor -> Type search query 'Attack on Titan S02' -> See manual search results from multiple sources -> Click a result -> Click Apply -> POST /api/v1/metadata/apply returns success -> See updated metadata in editor and side panel

Navigate to /media/:type/:id -> Click Edit -> Click 'Manual Search' -> Type rare query -> Search returns no results -> See 'No matches found' message -> Click 'Edit manually' -> Make manual edits and Save

features.name: Pattern Learning
features.description: System learns filename patterns from user corrections, displays learned patterns with statistics, allows deleting patterns, and auto-applies learned rules when matched.
user_flows: Navigate to /media/:type/:id -> Edit metadata and correct parsed fields -> After save, see prompt 'Save this pattern for future auto-parsing?' -> Click Save Pattern -> POST /api/v1/learning/patterns returns success -> Navigate to /settings/qbittorrent -> Open Learned Patterns list -> See new pattern with usage stats

Simulate new file arrival that matches saved pattern -> System auto-applies learned pattern -> See auto-apply notification toast 'Metadata auto-applied using learned pattern' -> Click notification to view mapping details

Navigate to /settings/qbittorrent -> Open Learned Patterns list -> Click Delete on a pattern -> DELETE /api/v1/learning/patterns/:id returns 500 -> See inline error 'Unable to delete pattern' and option to retry

routes.description: Home dashboard with download status, recent media, connection health indicator
Browse media library with grid/list view toggle, type filtering, sorting, pagination
Search movies and TV shows via TMDb with type filtering and pagination
Monitor qBittorrent downloads with status filtering and sorting
Configure qBittorrent connection settings with test connection
Media detail side panel showing movie or TV show metadata, credits, and metadata editor

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Home page showing active downloads, recently added media, and qBittorrent connection health
user_interactions: View active downloads with progress bars
Click QB status indicator to open connection history modal

features.name: Media Library
features.description: Browse and manage media library with grid and list views, filtering by type, sorting, and pagination
user_interactions: Toggle between grid and list view
Sort by column headers in list view

features.name: Search
features.description: Search movies and TV shows via TMDb with Traditional Chinese results
user_interactions: Type search query in search bar (minimum 2 characters)
Click result to view media detail

features.name: Downloads Monitor
features.description: Monitor qBittorrent downloads with real-time status updates and filtering
user_interactions: See empty state when no downloads match filter

features.name: Media Detail
features.description: Side panel showing full movie or TV show metadata with editing capability
user_interactions: View movie or TV show metadata (title, poster, genres, rating, overview)
Click Edit button to open metadata editor dialog
Edit title, year, genres, director, cast, overview in editor
Upload poster via URL or file drag-drop

features.name: qBittorrent Settings
features.description: Configure and test qBittorrent connection with host, username, and password
user_interactions: See connection test result (success with version or error)

features.name: Connection Health Monitoring
features.description: Real-time qBittorrent connection health indicator with history panel
user_interactions: Click indicator to open connection history modal
View history of connection events with timestamps

features.name: Manual Metadata Search
features.description: Search and apply metadata manually when automatic parsing fails
user_interactions: Open manual search from metadata editor
Browse search results from multiple sources

features.name: Pattern Learning
features.description: System learns filename patterns from user corrections for future automatic parsing
user_interactions: Prompted to save pattern after manual correction
View learned patterns list with statistics
See auto-apply notification when pattern is reused

known_limitations.issue: Library grid items do not navigate to detail panel yet
known_limitations.impact: Clicking grid items has no action, Story 5.6 not implemented
All routes are publicly accessible, Epic 7 not started

known_limitations.issue: Metadata editor tests are all skipped due to UUID vs TMDb ID mismatch
known_limitations.impact: 46 E2E tests disabled, Story 3.8 UI testing blocked

known_limitations.issue: Download pause/resume/delete actions not implemented in UI
known_limitations.impact: Users can only view downloads, cannot control them from Vido UI
